entry.title: IDC W56HZV15D0031 (P00030) awarded to OSHKOSH DEFENSE, LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: INCORPORATES THE INTEGRATED LOGISTICS SCHEDULE SHIFT RELATED TO OSHKOSH'S MISTAKE IN PROPOSAL SUBMITTAL. THE FAMILY OF HEAVY TACTICAL VEHICLES (FHTV) IV CONTRACT IS A FIVE YEAR FIXED-PRICE INCENTIVE-FIRM, REQUIREMENTS CONTRACT.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC W56HZV15D0031 (P00031) awarded to OSHKOSH DEFENSE, LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: FAMILY OF HEAVY TACTICAL VEHICLE (FHTV) IV FIXED PRICE INCENTIVE - FIRM TARGET (FPIF) SOLE SOURCE, REQUIREMENTS CONTRACT AWARDED TO OSHKOSH DEFENSE, LLC. ESTABLISHES RANGE ORDER YEAR 1 THROUGH ORDER YEAR 5 PRICES FOR THE RECAPITALIZATION OF HEAVY EXPANDED MOBILITY TACTICAL TRUCKS (HEMTTS), RECAP PALLETIZED LOAD SYSTEMS (PLS) AND NEW PLS TRAILERS. ESTIMATED CONTRACT VALUE IS $781M. THIS MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE THE CONSIDERATION AGREEMENT BETWEEN OSK AND THE GOVERNMENT FOR THE HEMTT MANUAL RELEASE AUTHORIZATION IN SUPPORT OF A DIRECT COMMERCIAL SALE. AS A RESULT, M983A4 VEHICLES WILL BE PAINTED WOODLAND CAMOUFLAGE ON DO'S 0011, 0019, 0020 AND 0021.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ESTIMATED CONTRACT VALUE IS $781M.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC W56HZV15D0031 (P00037) awarded to OSHKOSH DEFENSE, LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: FAMILY OF HEAVY TACTICAL VEHICLE (FHTV) IV CONTRACT A FIXED-PRICE-INCENTIVE-FIRM (FPIF) SOLE SOURCE, REQUIREMENTS CONTRACT AWARDED TO OSHKOSH DEFENSE, LLC WITH ESTABLISHED RANGE PRICING. THIS MOD REDUCES THE FPIF CEILING FROM 118% TO 115%.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
